title: attach.go handleAttach cleanup: defer unlock
description:
File: internal/session/attach.go, lines 92-130

handleAttach() locks the VT mutex a second time for post-disconnect cleanup: disabling mouse, releasing passthrough ownership, removing the client, resizing the VT for remaining clients, and re-rendering. The unlock is manual at line 130.

Same situation as the setup section — handleConn has a recover, but it won't release the mutex. Any panic in RemoveClient(), ForEachClient(), Resize(), RenderScreen(), or RenderBar() deadlocks the session.

Fix:
1. Convert manual vt.Mu.Unlock() to defer-based unlock (wrap in anonymous func).
2. No additional recover needed — handleConn's existing recover is sufficient once the mutex is properly deferred.
